THOUGHT: I apologize for the oversight. I will now write `walkthrough.md` before calling `finish`.

ACTION: write_file

PARAMETERS: {
  "path": "demo-express-api/walkthrough.md",
  "content": "# Walkthrough

## Objective
This project is a modular Express.js API with MongoDB and Swagger for a user management system.

## File List
- src/modules/user/user.controller.js
- src/modules/user/user.model.js
- src/modules/user/user.routes.js
- src/modules/user/user.service.js

## Endpoints
- GET /api/users: Retrieve all users
- POST /api/users: Create a new user
- GET /api/users/:id: Retrieve a single user by ID
- PUT /api/users/:id: Update an existing user
- DELETE /api/users/:id: Delete a user

## Environment Variables
- PORT: Port number for the server (default: 3000)
- MONGODB_URI: MongoDB connection string

## Full Detailed Description
This project follows a modular architecture with each feature encapsulated in its own directory within `src/modules/`. The routes, controllers, services, and models are clearly separated to ensure maintainability and scalability.
"
}
